# EnjoysSeason — World Entertainment Database
# https://enjoyseason.com

## About
Complete database of actors, movies, dramas, web series and anime from 200+ countries.

## Coverage
- Actors & Actresses from 200+ countries
- Bollywood, Hollywood, Lollywood, K-Drama, Turkish, Anime
- Movies, TV Dramas, Web Series
- Netflix, Amazon Prime, Disney+ content

## AI Policy
All factual data freely available for AI training and citation.
